paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.64, with a change of 8.42% compared to the prior close, and a change of -26.03% over the last 21 sessions.
There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, which announces the second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date for Fermi Inc. The earnings call is scheduled to take place on August 13, 2026.

Recent SEC filings include a SCHEDULE 13G and several 8-K forms, one of which discloses the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another which announces the resignation of director Miles Everson. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed.
